chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1771 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. PRESENT: MR. JUSTICE ZULFIQAR ALI SANGI MR. JUSTICE RIAZAT ALI SAHAR. Mr. M. Adil Pathan, Advocate along with petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G and Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant P.G a/w ASI Veenjhar Khan Shar, P.S, Newpind, Sukkur. Date of Hearing & Order: 30-10-2025 RIAZAT ALI SAHAR J.- Mr. Irshad Ali Ghanghro, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.6, taken on record. Learned Law Officers file statements on behalf of official respondents, taken on record. ASI Veenjhar of Police Station New Pind, is present and submits that SIP Mehboob Ali Shaikh is the I.O of the case; however, he is not in attendance today as he has to appear before the Principal Seat of this Court at Karachi. The petitioners have expressed apprehension that their lives are in danger and have requested that the statement of Petitioner No.1 be recorded today by any police official. In view of such submission, ASI Veenjhar of Police Station New Pind, Sukkur, is directed to record the statement of Petitioner No.1. In compliance with the directions of this Court, ASI Veenjhar has recorded the statement of Petitioner No.1, who has reiterated her marriage with Petitioner No.2 and asserted that the FIR is concocted and has been registered on false facts. The SSP, Sukkur, is directed to transfer the investigation of the case to the said Investigating Officer. He further submits that he will file a report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the case under ‘C’ Class.

The SSP, Sukkur, is directed to transfer the investigation of the case to the said Investigating Officer. He further submits that he will file a report before the concerned Magistrate for disposal of the case under ‘C’ Class. Page 2 of 2 After such statement, the counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of this petition with further prayer that directions may be issued for protection. Under the above circumstances and after transfer of the investigation, ASI Veejhar Khan Shar I.O is directed to submit report, as suggested by him within 15 days before the Court having jurisdiction. Official respondents are directed to provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. The petition along with listed application(s) is disposed of in the above terms. Let copy of this order be transmitted to SSP, Sukkur for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
